description: Upstream hostile data: summary-hostile.json lists every hostile id; hostiles/{id}.json holds full detail. Individual hostile files are not documented one-by-one (bulk).

id.description: Hostile id; matches hostiles/{id}.json and hostile API.
Primary key for this hostile spawn definition.

faction.description: Faction id and loca_id for hostile faction.

level.description: Suggested or base level for this hostile.

count.description: Spawn count or fleet size hint.

strength.description: Upstream strength metric (not necessarily Kobayashi combat power).

systems.description: System ids where this hostile can appear.

resources.description: Resource drop or cost hints (structure varies).

components.description: Ship-like components (warp, shield, weapons, armor) with data.tag and combat stats; analogous to ship detail components.

relations.description: One detail JSON per summary row id.

normalization_targets.description: Kobayashi hostiles are normalized separately; upstream hostile JSON informs stats when refreshed from community/stfc.space pipelines.

notes: Do not enumerate hostiles/*.json individually; schema is uniform per id.
Combat normalization for Kobayashi uses data/hostiles/, not raw upstream files, unless an import path is run.
